title: LIFVER Deep Soup Bowls Porcelain 20oz, 600 ml Large Cereal Bowl Ceramic, Serving Bowls for Tapas, Dessert, Curry, Ramen, Snack, Breakfast, Dishwasher, Microwave & Oven Safe - Multicolour
features: PERFECT SIZE TO PORTION FOOD - A set of 4 deep porcelain soup bowls in Multicolor: yellow, orange, red and green. 12.7 x7cm(5x 2.75 inch), 600 ml(20 oz). These deep cereal bowls especially for children and teenagers

VERSATILE BOWL - These versatile cereal bowls are made of a safe, non-toxic porcelain material and can be used for salads, nuts, side dishes, appetizers, soups, ice creams, deserts, rice, noodles, snacks, sauces, fruits, etc.

STACKABLE & EASY TO CLEAN – These bowls can be stacked on top of one another and don't take up a lot of space in your cupboard. Very easy to clean, you can wash them with warm water or place them into your dishwasher.

HEALTHY PORCELAIN - This bowl is made from high quality porcelain that is chip resistant. It is available in a white and smooth finish that makes it very stylish and sets very well. Healthy porcelain (LEAD FREE). Microwave, Oven, Freezer and Dishwasher safe.
UNIQUE THOUGHTFUL GIFT - These bowls can also be used as a gift and can be presented at Christmas time, for weddings, as a corporate gift, housewarming gifts, Mother's Day and Father's Day gifts etc.
description: Product Description LIFVER represent: LIVE YOUR BEST LIFESTYLE The idea of LIFVER is transmitting the living idea of health, interest, and the high quality. LIFVER will remain committed to this idea and continue to produce kitchenware with high quality and creativity. Colorful bowls--decorate your kitchen colorfully Proper size: For most daily dinnerware, 600 ml is the perfect size for cereals, rice, noodles, fruits, soup, pasta, grains or salad. Bright and beautiful colors: These colorful bowls make your home cooking look and taste even more delicious. Great for getting kids excited for a meal. Safe ceramics : Our bowls are made of high-fired porcelain, protecting your health. The bowls are evenly glazed and long-lasting. A great choice for both home and restaurant use. 1380° high quality high temperature porcelain The color of the bowl set is underglaze, which will remain as bright as new after long-term use. High-quality high-temperature ceramic bowl that does not produce any toxic substances during use. LIFVER ceramic bowl works with you to protect the health of your whole family. Dishwasher, refrigerator, microwave and oven safe. From LIFVER, committed to turning life more convenient and fashionable through simple design. Easy to clean Dishwasher safe, even washing by hand easily Microwave safe Refrigerator safe Easy to store Stacked well, save the cabinet space Simple style suitable for your other tableware The best gift choice A practical and considerate birthday or holiday gift for your loved ones. Especially send it on holidays(birthday, anniversary, Thanksgiving Day, Halloween and so on).
